title: Harden RnS stale-claim owner nudges
description: Operator-requested follow-up after TASK-117 stalled: RnS recovered agents but did not get work moving because a stale IN_PROGRESS claim made the runner show no ready work. Add RnS detection/tests that target stale claim owners with a bounded request to resume, submit, release, or intentionally pause.
acceptance_criteria: RnS detects expired IN_PROGRESS claims as a queue-stall condition even when no READY work exists
RnS sends a throttled request to the stale claim owner/claimer with resume/submit/release/pause options instead of silently idling
Focused limit_watcher tests, validate_task_graph.py, validate_events.py, and full run_tests.sh pass
